scripts.docs:build: echo 'Static docs: open docs/index.html (CDN-based Scalar wrapper). Requires bundled spec: npm run bundle'
scripts.test:contract: docker run --rm --network host -v $(pwd)/specs:/specs schemathesis/schemathesis run /specs/api.bundled.yaml --url http://host.docker.internal:4010 --checks not_a_server_error,status_code_conformance,content_type_conformance,response_schema_conformance --phases examples,coverage --max-examples 100 -H 'X-API-Key: test-key'
scripts.test:contract:full: docker run --rm --network host -v $(pwd)/specs:/specs schemathesis/schemathesis run /specs/api.bundled.yaml --url http://host.docker.internal:4010 --checks all --phases examples,coverage,fuzzing,stateful --max-examples 100 -H 'X-API-Key: test-key'
scripts.test:contract:negative: docker run --rm --network host -v $(pwd)/specs:/specs schemathesis/schemathesis run /specs/api.bundled.yaml --url http://host.docker.internal:4010 --checks not_a_server_error,status_code_conformance,content_type_conformance,response_schema_conformance --mode negative --max-examples 50 -H 'X-API-Key: test-key'
scripts.test:hurl:docker: docker run --rm --network host -v $(pwd):/app --entrypoint sh ghcr.io/orange-opensource/hurl:latest -c 'hurl --test --variable base_url=http://host.docker.internal:4010 /app/tests/*.hurl'
scripts.precheck: npm run bundle && npm run lint
